description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52227_0]</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52227_0]</color> <color=#28d9ed>debuff(s)</color> from all allies.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52227_0]</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52227_0]個</color>解除する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52227_0]</color> 확률로 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52227_0]개</color> 해제합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52227_0]</color>的几率解除全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52227_0]个</color><color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>。

description.en: <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> all allies for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52228_0]</color> of Saeran's Max Health.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を【セイラン】の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52228_0]</color>回復させる。
description.kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 세이란 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52228_0]</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.zh: 使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复相当于萨伊蓝生命值上限的<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52228_0]</color>。

description.en: Heals one ally by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_0]</color> and reduces the target's <color=#28d9ed>skill cooldown</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_1] turn(s)</color>. Additionally, increases the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_2]</color>.
description.jp: 味方単体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_0]</color>回復した後、対象の<color=#28d9ed>スキルターン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_1]ターン</color>減少させる。また、対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_2]</color>UPさせる。
description.kr: 아군 한 명의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_0]</color> 회복시킨 후, 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>스킬 쿨타임</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_1]턴</color> 감소시킵니다. 그리고 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_2]</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 使1名友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_0]</color>后,使目标的<color=#28d9ed>技能冷却时间</color>减少<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_1]回合</color>。并使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升\n<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52229_2]</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> proportional to missing Health. <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> can increase up to <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n残りHPが低いほど<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPする。<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>は最大<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高。<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>最多提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
